config.RecolorOverwrite.name: Recolor
config.RecolorOverwrite.description: Choose the recolor for mod assets that best fits your needs. Leave blank and it will autodetect from these options.
config.WallColor.name: Wall Color
config.WallColor.description: Choose from a variety of wall colors.
config.Coops.name: Coops
config.Coops.description: Enables coops. Caution: do not toggle while standing inside a coop. For best use, toggle before constructing or upgrading.
config.Barns.name: Barns
config.Barns.description: Enables barns. Caution: do not toggle while standing inside a barn. For best use, toggle before constructing or upgrading.
config.ExpandedCoops.name: Coops for Profession Overhauls
config.ExpandedCoops.description: Enables larger coops if you are using Walk of Life (Rebirth) OR Vanilla Plus Professions. Toggle on when you have unlocked extra animal slots.
config.ExpandedBarns.name: Barns for Profession Overhauls
config.ExpandedBarns.description: Enables larger barns if you are using Walk of Life (Rebirth) OR Vanilla Plus Professions. Toggle on when you have unlocked extra animal slots.
config.ShaneScene.name: Shane's 8-Heart Scene
config.ShaneScene.description: Restyles Shane's 8-heart event map. Does not change event. Choose *Worn* for Vanilla-like. Choose *Fresh* for a clean building.
config.HayRecolor.name: Hay Recolor
config.HayRecolor.description: Makes hay colors consistant in the buildings. MedievalMatch will make hay align with Gwen's seasonal colors (Requires Medieval Craftables).
config.ClearHay.name: Hay Blaster 9000
config.ClearHay.description: Deletes stuck objects. Triggers one step into a coop or barn, targeting the old bench feeder's location. Safe for animals. If you're hearing explosions, you left this on!
